reviews.review_description: The developers of this game doesn’t like xorwire which are the main developers of the original game stupid chimp slop, so these people decided to copy this game. 1 star. Don’t support stolen games even though some of it is original but same map design. Play stupid chimp slop instead, it’s the original on the meta store.

developer_response.body: The game is inspired by various other games, and all assets are original and created by us. We hope to see you put a 5 star review instead :)

reviews.review_title: I don’t careI don’t care what people say
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. I’ve been playing it for some weeks now it’s one of the best games I’ve ever played. I love making videos on it. I have heard that the map design is stolen from stupid chimp slop but I also have downloaded stupid chimp slop maybe they could’ve changed the map but the map is fastly different from blud slop. Especially with this new update with a surface much like scary baboon, but the surface is much better overall one of the best to do it.￼

Everything about this game is great (except for the stolen assets) but there is one thing that really makes my blood boil and that is the purchasable mods. I genuinely hate when these gtag fan games add purchasable mods because it just allows people to be better than you for 20$ and no skill they are literally paying to win so if you get rid of the mods then maybe I will give this game 5 stars but for now this game is ahh

The game is fairly good. awesome AI, not buggy, Good servers, but one thing. People hate it because it's copied, BUT every Gorillatag game is a COPIED version. To horror, and hangout.  also the game models are so CUTE, making it pretty awesome, the models SO NICE, but Stupid Chimp Slop is good, but... The monsters are Stolen, the skeleton centipede is a Copy from Fever Dream (a vr horror game) which isn't CREATIVE. And the owners of breakout made it, which i am sad about it. Breakout Vr is AWESOME. But Blud slop has a few flaws, The modders Pretending to be the owner, dev, or moderator, But the games only been out for 24 days and it's blowing up! Good Joob🤯

it's good but it needs more monsters and i think the monster should be faster you could outrun them easily. But other than that it's a good game the monkey models are super cute i think the cosmetics look great
So a few days ago, I bought a Mod Menu on blud slop. I wake up today,log on to blud slop AND THEY TOOK IT AWAY AND NOW I HAVE TO BUY IT AGAIN!!!! People reading this, DO NOT BUY THIS GAME!
